mapper.select: SELECT wp.card_id AS cardId, s.subject_name AS subjectName, SUBSTRING(c.front_content, 1, 50) AS frontContent, wp.error_count AS errorCount, DATE_FORMAT(wp.last_error_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastErrorTime FROM biz_weak_point wp LEFT JOIN biz_card c ON wp.card_id = c.card_id LEFT JOIN biz_subject s ON c.subject_id = s.subject_id WHERE wp.user_id = #{userId} AND wp.status = 'active' ORDER BY wp.error_count DESC, wp.last_error_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_weak_point WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active'
